summary: Verified P1+P2=37 fix is working correctly. All 17 backend tests pass with 100% match rate for P1+P2=37 constraint. Frontend EuroMillions mode works correctly with proper Last Draw display, ball animation, and star icons.
passed_tests: GET /api/euromillions/draws - Returns historical draws with correct structure
P1+P2=37 constant sum verification - 100% match rate (9/9 tickets)
P1+P2=37 with sorting verification - All tickets sorted, unique, P3/P4/P5 > P2
Prediction without birthday/name (persona buttons use case)
Multiple predictions don't crash (circle partner calculations stable)
Frontend: Last Euro Draw displays with gold star icons
Frontend: Ball animation with 'Mixing balls...' state
Frontend: Olivia's Kiss of Luck button visible
test_credentials: None required - all endpoints publicly accessible
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1+P2=37 constraint is now properly enforced. The fix (lines 1523-1568 in euromillions_routes.py) works by: (1) After sorting, calculating target_p2 = 37 - P1, (2) Replacing existing P2 with target_p2, (3) Ensuring P3/P4/P5 are all > target_p2. All tests pass with 100% match rate.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: P1+P2=37 constant sum was not enforced (0% match rate in iteration_7)
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Design flaw - scenario_p1 and scenario_p2 were added to candidates but after sorting, they weren't necessarily the two smallest numbers
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added post-sorting enforcement logic (lines 1523-1568) that: (1) Calculates target_p2 = 37 - current_p1, (2) Replaces P2 with target_p2, (3) Ensures P3/P4/P5 are all > target_p2 by regenerating if needed
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Manual curl test and pytest both show 100% match rate for P1+P2=37
